hpoHeaders.hpoLabel: Macrodontia of permanent maxillary central incisor
Aplasia of the distal phalanx of the 5th finger

individualData.title: MAU2 and NIPBL Variants Impair the Heterodimerization of the Cohesin Loader Subunits and Cause Cornelia de Lange Syndrome.
Clinical study and genetic analysis of Cornelia de Lange syndrome caused by a novel MAU2 gene variant in a Chinese boy.
Pathogenic variants in the cohesin loader subunit MAU2 underlie a distinct Cornelia de Lange Syndrome subtype.
